//: Exercises the OTHER halt path: no Effect::Exit. The FSM emits 'step'
//2: while count>0, then emits nothing — the scheduler halts because no
//3: FSM is scheduled (no effects, no tracked state change). Mirror of

fsms.smtlib:
(declare-const count Int)
(declare-const _count Int)
(declare-const is_first_tick Bool)
(declare-const more Bool)
(assert (= count (ite is_first_tick 3 (- _count 1))))
(assert (= more (> count 0)))
